title: stipa neaei
intro: Stipa neaei, also known as blue oat grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stipa neaei include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Stipa neaei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
